notes: Reference only — confirms pipeline works. Not primary backbone.
Baseline B1 — official 4TU zip + gmberton synthetic UTM labels. 320x320 configuration consistent across all methods.
Baseline B2 — manual fixed fusion alpha=0.5. EigenPlaces visual similarity plus BGE-large language similarity using LaVPR AmsterTime descriptions.

Primary method result — SU-based confidence-gated top-10 reranking with language threshold=0.05. Language active for 401/1231 queries. Paired bootstrap: -3 queries vs B1, 95% CI [-1.38, +0.89pp], not statistically meaningful.
Full-database fusion variant — SU-based confidence-gated fusion with tau=1.0 and language threshold=0.05. Language active for 401/1231 queries. Exactly matches B1 R@1 query count.
Baseline B1 — MSLS-val with 740 LaVPR queries and 18871 database images. EigenPlaces visual-only.
Baseline B2 — manual fixed fusion alpha=0.5. EigenPlaces visual similarity plus BGE-large language similarity using LaVPR MSLS-val descriptions.
Primary method result — SU-based confidence-gated top-10 reranking with language threshold=0.05. Language active for 205/740 queries. Best R@1 result on MSLS-val.
Full-database fusion variant — SU-based confidence-gated fusion with tau=1.0 and language threshold=0.05. Language active for 205/740 queries.
Tau ablation on MSLS-val — top-10 reranking. Mean alpha=0.893, language active for 205/740 queries.
Tau ablation on MSLS-val — top-10 reranking. Same as primary setting. Mean alpha=0.885, language active for 205/740 queries.
Tau ablation on MSLS-val — top-10 reranking. Mean alpha=0.875, language active for 205/740 queries.

Baseline B1 — Nordland-clean 400 aligned summer-winter pairs. Summer database start index 1900, winter query start index 2000. Synthetic coordinate spacing 1m, so auto_VPR 25m threshold corresponds to ±25 sampled frames.

Baseline B2 — manual fixed fusion alpha=0.5. EigenPlaces visual similarity plus BGE-large language similarity. BLIP captions were generic/noisy on winter railway scenes, causing a -7.0pp R@1 drop vs B1.

Primary method result — SU-based confidence-gated top-10 reranking with language threshold=0.05. Language active for 165/400 queries. Recovers the fixed-fusion degradation and achieves +7.2pp R@1 vs B2.
Full-database fusion variant — SU-based confidence-gated fusion with tau=1.0 and language threshold=0.05. Language active for 165/400 queries.
Exploratory railway-specific prompted-caption variant. Removed obvious caption hallucinations and improved R@5, but reduced R@1 compared with the original gated result. Not used as primary result.
